actionable_ideas: Optimize the app's login process to reduce errors and eliminate unnecessary steps such as selfie requirements when OTP is already provided
Improve the app's performance by addressing slow loading issues, particularly with charts and other graphics-intensive features
Enhance customer support by providing more effective and efficient solutions to user problems, potentially including more comprehensive training for customer care representatives
